series_metadata.series_description: This is a license issued to a milk producer i.e. a dairy farmer. Licenses are perpetual, and they are active as long as the producer is in business and the license has not been revoked.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for 4 years after the year in which the license went inactive. ; Electronic: Keep for 4 years after the year in which the license went inactive., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
